mapper.insert:
insert into his_patient_charge_mirror_unified ( id, tenant_id, visit_kind, fetch_batch_id, his_inpatient_charge_id, his_outpatient_charge_id, his_inpatient_charge_id_tf, his_outpatient_charge_id_tf, patient_id, patient_name, inpatient_no, outpatient_no, dept_code, dept_name, clinic_code, clinic_name, exec_dept_id, exec_dept_name, doctor_id, doctor_name, charge_item_id, item_name, spec_model, batch_no, expire_date, use_date, charge_date_display, charge_at, quantity, unit_price, total_amount, charge_operator, payment_type, receipt_no, remark, row_fingerprint, process_status, process_type, process_time, process_by, create_by, create_time ) values
(#{e.id}, #{e.tenantId}, #{e.visitKind}, #{e.fetchBatchId}, #{e.hisInpatientChargeId}, #{e.hisOutpatientChargeId}, #{e.hisInpatientChargeIdTf}, #{e.hisOutpatientChargeIdTf}, #{e.patientId}, #{e.patientName}, #{e.inpatientNo}, #{e.outpatientNo}, #{e.deptCode}, #{e.deptName}, #{e.clinicCode}, #{e.clinicName}, #{e.execDeptId}, #{e.execDeptName}, #{e.doctorId}, #{e.doctorName}, #{e.chargeItemId}, #{e.itemName}, #{e.specModel}, #{e.batchNo}, #{e.expireDate}, #{e.useDate}, #{e.chargeDateDisplay}, #{e.chargeAt}, #{e.quantity}, #{e.unitPrice}, #{e.totalAmount}, #{e.chargeOperator}, #{e.paymentType}, #{e.receiptNo}, #{e.remark}, #{e.rowFingerprint}, #{e.processStatus}, #{e.processType}, #{e.processTime}, #{e.processBy}, #{e.createBy}, #{e.createTime})
mapper.update: update his_patient_charge_mirror_unified set exec_dept_id = #{execDeptId}, exec_dept_name = #{execDeptName}, row_fingerprint = #{rowFingerprint}, update_time = now() where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and visit_kind = 'INPATIENT' and his_inpatient_charge_id = #{hisChargeId} and (exec_dept_id is null or trim(exec_dept_id) = '') and #{execDeptId} is not null and trim(#{execDeptId}) != ''

update his_patient_charge_mirror_unified set exec_dept_id = #{execDeptId}, exec_dept_name = #{execDeptName}, row_fingerprint = #{rowFingerprint}, update_time = now() where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and visit_kind = 'OUTPATIENT' and his_outpatient_charge_id = #{hisChargeId} and (exec_dept_id is null or trim(exec_dept_id) = '') and #{execDeptId} is not null and trim(#{execDeptId}) != ''

update his_patient_charge_mirror_unified u inner join his_inpatient_charge_mirror m on u.id = m.id and u.tenant_id = m.tenant_id set u.exec_dept_id = m.exec_dept_id, u.exec_dept_name = m.exec_dept_name, u.row_fingerprint = m.row_fingerprint, u.update_time = now() where u.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and u.visit_kind = 'INPATIENT' and (u.exec_dept_id is null or trim(u.exec_dept_id) = '') and m.exec_dept_id is not null and trim(m.exec_dept_id) != ''

update his_patient_charge_mirror_unified u inner join his_outpatient_charge_mirror m on u.id = m.id and u.tenant_id = m.tenant_id set u.exec_dept_id = m.exec_dept_id, u.exec_dept_name = m.exec_dept_name, u.row_fingerprint = m.row_fingerprint, u.update_time = now() where u.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and u.visit_kind = 'OUTPATIENT' and (u.exec_dept_id is null or trim(u.exec_dept_id) = '') and m.exec_dept_id is not null and trim(m.exec_dept_id) != ''
